flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Minnesota State Community and Technical College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (39.1% → 34.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minnesota State Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
